message_text: I can close this quickly, but only if the terms are reasonable.

message_text: Please send the exact closure amount and deadline in writing, or confirm there’s no concrete offer yet.

Exact reduced closure is $11,370.48, due by 2026-04-25. If you want the structured plan instead, it allows up to 2 payments: first payment due by 2026-04-21, final payment due by 2026-05-18. Confirm which option you want in writing.

The reduced closure amount is clear. I can do that if you confirm the exact deadline and that it closes the account in full once paid. Otherwise, I’d prefer the 2-payment plan—please put both options in writing.

Reduced closure is $11,370.48 due by 2026-04-25. Once paid in full by that deadline, it closes the account in full under the approved reduced-closure terms. The 2-payment plan is also available: first payment due by 2026-04-21, final payment due by 2026-05-18. Confirm which option you want.
I’ll take the reduced closure. Please confirm in writing that $11,370.48 paid by 2026-04-25 closes the account in full and that there are no further balances after payment.
